heading: Reimbursement of moving expenses
label: 82 Reimbursement of moving expenses
text: Except as provided in section 132(a)(6), there shall be included in gross income (as compensation for services) any amount received or accrued, directly or indirectly, by an individual as a payment for or reimbursement of expenses of moving from one residence to another residence which is attributable to employment or self-employment.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “of moving expenses” for “for expenses of moving” in section catchline.Pub. L. 115–1411993— substituted “Except as provided in section 132(a)(6), there shall” for “There shall”.Pub. L. 103–66

Effective Date of 1993 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to reimbursements or other payments in respect of expenses incurred after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–66section 13213(e) of Pub. L. 103–66section 62 of this titleDec. 31, 1993

Effective DateSection applicable to taxable years beginning after , except that it does not apply to moving expenses paid or incurred before , in connection with the commencement of work by the taxpayer as an employee at a new principal place of work of which the taxpayer had been notified by his employer on or before , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1969 Amendment note under .December 31, 1969July 1, 1970December 19, 1969section 231(d) of Pub.
